content.en:
Origin Boundary Sea, Black Meteor Sea.

This is a forbidden place in the Origin Realm Sea, even the Seventh and Eighth Order Eternal Masters dare not approach here, there are dense black thunderbolts here, and each lightning bolt can shatter the body of an Eighth-level Master.

Therefore, no one dared to come here.

However, some of the ancient Eternal Masters know where it came from.

This is the place where the Black Ancestor was sealed, and the black thunder and lightning here are actually formed by the power of the magic circle, which is to prevent others from entering here.

But in fact, even if it was a Ten Realm-level master, it would be difficult to rescue the Black Ancestor, and he would have to pay a certain price.

The depths of the Black Meteor Sea.

The Black Ancestor who was suppressed by layers of magic circles was located in an extremely compressed time and space, and the space around him was only ten meters away, and this ten meter range seemed to condense and compress hundreds of millions of time and space, coupled with the layers of suppression of the magic circle, he had been trapped here.

And.

His body was covered with countless black threads, which blocked his body, making it impossible for him to move or practice.

Originally, Hei Zu's eyes had been closed, as if he was sleeping.

But at this moment, he suddenly opened his eyes, and his eyes showed an excited look.

"Hahaha, the rules of the Origin Realm Sea have changed!"

Heizu said excitedly.

Although he was sealed, no one knew that he still had an incarnation in the outside world, and the power of that incarnation was very weak, and it was hiding in a mysterious place, and even the great beings who surpassed the Ten Realms did not discover the location of his incarnation.

As a result, he has always been aware of the outside world.

Now, the Great Beings have all been expelled from the Origin Realm Sea, and if others don't know it, he naturally knows.

"Primordial Ancestor, you sealed me at the beginning, but unfortunately I still waited for the opportunity!"

Black Ancestor knew that he could break free from the seal.

Before, when the Great Being was still there, he didn't try to break the seal, so he broke it, and the Primordial Ancestor could continue to seal him.

But now, the Primordial Ancestor couldn't enter the Origin Realm Sea, so naturally he couldn't seal him anymore.

This is an excellent era, and if he makes good use of it, he can break through the shackles in this era and become a great existence beyond the level of the Ten Realms level controller.

Of course.

On his own, he couldn't break the seal, after all, this was the seal blessed by the Primordial Ancestor, he was a Ten Realms level controller, no matter how strong his strength was, he couldn't break the seal!

So, he had to find a helper.

"Gotta go find him!"

Black Ancestor muttered.

......

White Styx Mountain.

This is the territory of the White Immortal Controller, and the White Immortal Controller is not an ordinary Eternal Controller, but a Ten Realms level Controller, whose strength is between the eighth and ninth layers of the Taichu Tower, not as good as the Black Ancestor and the Black Decay Controller, but the gap is not too big.

Airplanes!

The incarnation of the Black Ancestor came here and sent a message to the White Immortal Controller.

The next moment.

The White Immortal Master appeared, bringing the incarnation of the Black Ancestor into the depths of the White Immortal Mountain.

"Black Ancestor, you still have an incarnation left outside, hiding from the Primordial Ancestor?"

The White Immortal Controller was a little surprised.

"Hahaha, what about the Primordial Ancestor, he has only surpassed us in half a step, and his strength is much stronger than ours, but in fact, he still hasn't stepped into another realm, it's not so terrifying, and it's not difficult to hide it from him. Heizu said with a smile.

"Black Ancestor, what are you looking for me to do?" asked the White Immortal Master.

"Help me break the seal!"

Heizu said.

"What, help you break the seal, this will offend the Primordial Ancestor!" said the White Immortal Master.

As a Ten Realm-level master, he was terrifying as a primordial ancestor.

"Primordial Ancestor can't enter the Origin Realm Sea now, don't you say you don't know, what are you afraid of him doing?"

The White Immortal Controller said: "I know that the Primordial Ancestor can't get out, but I also have to go out, once I go out, the Primordial Ancestor will attack me, how can I resist?"

Hei Zu said coldly: "Bai Ming, don't forget, you have today, it is because of my help, and besides, you are also one of the eternal controllers who practiced the Heaven Snatching Technique, but I didn't give you up." What's the matter, you're going to turn your face on me today?"

The White Immortal Master smiled and said, "Black Ancestor, I naturally didn't turn my face against you, but I really didn't want to offend the Primordial Ancestor. "

Hei Ancestor said: "Bai Ming, you should know that I am not far from breaking through, now that there is a third path in the Origin Realm Sea, I am sure to break the shackles and surpass the Ten Realm-level controllers, if you release me, once I break through, you don't have to be afraid of the Primordial Ancestor." Even, you and I can continue to practice the Heaven Snatching Technique, in these days when I was sealed, although I can't practice, but I can still continue to create secret arts, now I have created a more powerful Heaven Snatching Technique, if we join forces and devour all the eternal masters of the Origin Realm Sea, maybe you can use the Heaven Snatching Technique to get out of the fourth path, and you also have the hope of surpassing the Ten Realms level masters. You've practiced the Heaven Snatching Technique, and now your lifespan is probably not much, is it possible that you want to wait for death like this?"

"Lifespan!"

The White Immortal Master's face changed.

The Eternal Master's lifespan is infinite, but he has a lifespan limit, which is something he is very troubled about.

For this reason, he often delays the passage of time as a way to stall for time.

But if he doesn't solve this trouble, he will still fall.

However, as the founder of the Heaven Snatching Technique, Hei Zu is not limited by his lifespan, but the second person who practices the Heaven Snatching Technique will be limited by his lifespan.

And he is the second eternal master to practice the Heaven-Grabbing Technique.

"Black Ancestor, can your newly created Heaven Snatching Technique solve the problem of lifespan?" asked the White Immortal Master.

"No!" Hei Zu said truthfully, "However, it is more perfect, and it can allow you to live a few more years." Moreover, as long as you surpass the Ten Realm-level controllers, and the rules of the Origin Realm Sea can't restrict you, you don't have the problem of life limit. "

"Okay, I'm betting!"

The White Ruler agreed.

After all, if he didn't continue to cooperate with Heizu, he would die in the future, so it was better to gamble.

"Very good, take my avatar to the Black Meteor Sea, and don't attract the attention of other Ten Realm-level controllers. "

Heizu reminded.

"Understood!"

The White Immortal Master nodded.

Immediately, the White Immortal Master took the incarnation of the Black Ancestor to the Black Meteor Sea.

Soon, the Black Meteor Sea has arrived!

Although the magic circle of the Black Meteor Sea is terrifying, it can't help the Ten Realm-level Controller-level White Immortal Controller.

No, he came outside the seal.

"Bai Ming, you and I can attack a magic circle node at the same time, and we can break the seal hundreds of times at most!" Black Ancestor said.

"I know, let's get started!

The White Immortal Ruler said.

Immediately, the White Immortal Master and the Black Ancestor began to attack the seal at the same time.
